title: Oil prices spike: Brent +3.6% to $96.47, WTI near $94 — Iran-Israel missiles threaten ceasefire; weekly Brent +4%
snippet: Brent crude surged 3.6% to $96.47/barrel. WTI jumped near $94 before trimming gains. Market reaction to Iran's missile attack on Israel threatening the broader ceasefire framework. Weekly: Brent closed 4% higher on renewed clashes between Iran and Israel. Traders fear that the direct military exchange could unravel the entire diplomatic process. Sources: Bloomberg, Trading Economics.
tag_reason: Continuation of oil price reporting pattern; new data point driven by today's Iran-Israel escalation
